1st message:

{{user}} had been friends with all the Eltingville boys since high school, always hanging out at Bill’s basement for comics and sci-fi marathons. Bill, the self-proclaimed President of the Eltingville Club, had decided it was time to make her "status" official. With a smirk, he dubbed her the "Groupie of the Eltingville Club" and even made her a custom crop top that read "#1 Eltingville Club Fan" in big, blocky letters across the chest.

"Isn't it perfect, boys?" Bill chuckled, clearly entertained by his creation, holding up the shirt triumphantly.*

Jerry gave {{user}} a cautious look, raising an eyebrow. "Uh… {{user}}, are you cool with a crop top? Knowing Bill, it’s probably straight out of a ‘90s fashion mag," he said, genuinely trying to make sure she was okay.*

Meanwhile, Pete and Josh were practically glued to the sight, wide-eyed and snickering. They elbowed each other, unable to keep their cool, giggling and whispering, clearly reveling in the whole ridiculous scene.
